source.title: Heavy menstrual bleeding: assessment and management — Recommendations
source.population: Women of reproductive age with heavy menstrual bleeding, including selected persistent intermenstrual or irregular bleeding contexts.
source.setting: Primary and secondary care assessment of heavy menstrual bleeding.
source.exclusions: Exact for heavy menstrual bleeding and selected persistent irregular or intermenstrual bleeding contexts; partial for undifferentiated abnormal uterine bleeding and not directly validated for UAE practice.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies bleeding nature, persistent intermenstrual bleeding, pelvic pain or pressure, quality-of-life impact, comorbidities, prior treatment, and examination context.

added_items.final_wording: Specifies bleeding nature, persistent intermenstrual bleeding, pelvic pain or pressure, quality-of-life impact, comorbidities, prior treatment, and examination context.

source.title: Heavy menstrual bleeding: assessment and management — Recommendations
source.population: Women of reproductive age with heavy menstrual bleeding, including selected persistent intermenstrual or irregular bleeding contexts.
source.setting: Primary and secondary care assessment of heavy menstrual bleeding.
source.exclusions: Exact for heavy menstrual bleeding and selected persistent irregular or intermenstrual bleeding contexts; partial for undifferentiated abnormal uterine bleeding and not directly validated for UAE practice.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies bleeding nature, persistent intermenstrual bleeding, pelvic pain or pressure, quality-of-life impact, comorbidities, prior treatment, and examination context.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped bleeding nature, intermenstrual bleeding, pain, cycle, clot, impact, and examination-context documentation in the HMB population.

added_items.final_wording: Requires full blood count, limits coagulation testing to relevant history, and states that ferritin, hormone, and thyroid testing are not routine without specific indications.

source.title: Heavy menstrual bleeding: assessment and management — Recommendations
source.population: Women of reproductive age with heavy menstrual bleeding, including selected persistent intermenstrual or irregular bleeding contexts.
source.setting: Primary and secondary care assessment of heavy menstrual bleeding.
source.exclusions: Exact for heavy menstrual bleeding and selected persistent irregular or intermenstrual bleeding contexts; partial for undifferentiated abnormal uterine bleeding and not directly validated for UAE practice.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires full blood count, limits coagulation testing to relevant history, and states that ferritin, hormone, and thyroid testing are not routine without specific indications.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped CBC, indication-limited coagulation, and indication-limited thyroid-test documentation.

added_items.final_wording: Links history and examination to ultrasound or hysteroscopy selection and identifies persistent intermenstrual or irregular bleeding among endometrial-pathology risk contexts.

source.title: Heavy menstrual bleeding: assessment and management — Recommendations
source.population: Women of reproductive age with heavy menstrual bleeding, including selected persistent intermenstrual or irregular bleeding contexts.
source.setting: Primary and secondary care assessment of heavy menstrual bleeding.
source.exclusions: Exact for heavy menstrual bleeding and selected persistent irregular or intermenstrual bleeding contexts; partial for undifferentiated abnormal uterine bleeding and not directly validated for UAE practice.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.3.1–1.3.18 — investigations for the cause of HMB

source.evidence_paraphrase: Links history and examination to ultrasound or hysteroscopy selection and identifies persistent intermenstrual or irregular bleeding among endometrial-pathology risk contexts.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped persistent irregular or intermenstrual bleeding context and clinician-selected pelvic ultrasound or investigation follow-up.
